---
title: "VisualMath"
subtitle: "Interactive, browser-based visualizations of numerical methods."
author: Apurva Nakade
date: 2026-06-25
listing:
  contents: "/*/index.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
  categories: true
---

<!--
Copyright (c) 2026 Apurva Nakade. All rights reserved.
Released under Apache 2.0 license as described in the file LICENSE.
Authors: Apurva Nakade
-->

VisualMath collects interactive, browser-based visualizations for exploring numerical methods and discrete mathematics. Each page pairs short exposition with a live app — adjust an input and watch the method respond immediately, rather than reading about its behavior in the abstract.
